I Date of hearing: Date of Judgment: We proposed to dispose of all these petitions through this common order, as the same question of law and facts is involved in these petitions. The case of the petitioners in the above petitions is that the respondents advertised the post of Assistant Sub Inspectors (BIr109), in daih "Jang", Karachi, dated 4trr May, 1995.
